title: DonutSMP PvP
description: PvP-focused modpack for Donut SMP, optimized for fast combat, clear visuals, and smooth performance.
body:
# 🍩🔥 DONUT SMP PvP MODPACK 🔥🍩

## ⚔️ Built for PvP • Built for Speed • Built for Donut SMP

A **PvP-focused modpack** made specifically for **Donut SMP**, designed to deliver **high FPS**, **clean visuals**, and **fast, responsive combat** — without changing vanilla gameplay or breaking server rules.

---

## 🚀 WHY THIS MODPACK?

🔴 **High FPS & Stability**  
Optimized for intense PvP fights and high-player servers.

🟠 **Clean Combat Visibility**  
Reduced visual clutter so you can track enemies clearly.

🟡 **Fast & Responsive Gameplay**  
Smoother combat, better frame pacing, lower stutter.

🟢 **Fair Play Only**  
No cheats, no unfair advantages — **SMP safe**.

🔵 **Lightweight & Clean**  
Only essential mods. No unnecessary extras.

---

## ⚡ MADE FOR DONUT SMP

This modpack fully respects **Donut SMP rules and vanilla mechanics**, while giving you every **allowed advantage** in performance and clarity.

### Perfect for:
- 💎 Crystal PvP  
- 🗡️ Sword PvP  
- 🛡️ Base defense  
- 💥 High-pressure raids  

---

## 🎯 WHO IS THIS FOR?

✅ Competitive PvP players  
✅ Donut SMP regulars  
✅ Players who want smooth, lag-free gameplay  
✅ Anyone tired of bad FPS and visual clutter  

---

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT NOTICE

❌ No gameplay changes  
❌ No cheating or abusive mods  
✔ Performance, clarity & quality of life only  

✔ Safe for SMP  
✔ Regularly updated  
✔ Easy to install  

---

## 🔥 READY TO FIGHT?

Join Donut SMP with a modpack built for **speed**, **focus**, and **winning fights**.

**Download • Load • PvP**
